onboarding.welcome:
👋 Welcome to Tax Residency Tracker

Track how many days you spend in each country and avoid accidentally triggering tax residency thresholds.

Features:
• Calendar-year tracking
• Rolling 365-day tracking
• Residency alerts
• CSV/XLSX export
• Privacy-first
• No signup required
• Open source

This bot estimates physical presence only and does not provide legal or tax advice.

Please choose your language:
onboarding.choose_date_format: 请选择您偏好的日期格式：
onboarding.complete:
✅ 设置完成。

使用方法：

进入国家：
`/in Indonesia today`

离开国家：
`/out Indonesia 30.08.26`

示例：
`/in Thailand 15.01.26`
`/out Thailand today`

报告：
`/report`
`/report 2026`
`/report Indonesia`
`/report rolling`

机器人自动：
• 按日历年跟踪停留
• 按滚动365天跟踪停留
• 计算距离183天阈值剩余天数
• 在达到阈值前发出警告

可随时在 /settings 中更改语言或日期格式

请先输入您当前所在的国家。

start.welcome_back:
欢迎回来，{name}！

一切就绪。使用 `/in 国家 日期` 记录停留，或打开 `/report`。

in.country_not_recognized:
❌ 无法识别国家。

请输入有效的国家名称。

示例：
`/in Thailand today`
in.invalid_usage:
格式：`/in 国家 日期`

示例：`/in Thailand today`
in.invalid_date:
❌ 日期无效。

示例：`/in Thailand today`
in.not_onboarded: 请先使用 /start 完成设置。
in.remaining_line:
距离183天阈值还剩:
{days} 天

out.invalid_usage: 格式：`/out 国家 日期`
out.not_onboarded: 请先使用 /start 完成设置。
out.no_open_stay: 未找到 {country} 的开放停留。
out.exit_before_entry: ❌ 离开日期不能早于入境日期。
out.remaining_line:
距离183天阈值还剩:
{days} 天

historical_exit.prompt:
{flag} {country} was added starting on {entry_date}.

Your next known country entry is:
{next_flag} {next_country} on {next_entry_date}.

Was this also your {country} exit date?
historical_exit.another_date:
Okay. {country} is still open.

Send `/out {country} date` when you want to add the exit date.
historical_exit.expired: This action is no longer valid. Please send /in again.

where.no_active:
❌ No active stay found.

You can add one with:
/in Country today

history.empty: 🧳 No stays found for this filter.
history.custom_dates_error:
❌ Could not parse date range.

Examples:
01.03.26 05.07.26
01-03-2026 05-07-2026

settings.menu:
⚙️ Settings

Choose an option below:

🌐 Language
Change the bot language.

📥 Import data
Upload a CSV file to import your travel history.

📂 Export data
Download your complete travel history as CSV.

❌ Delete all data
Permanently delete all your travel history and settings.
This action cannot be undone.
settings.export_message: Here's your complete travel history in CSV format.
settings.delete_warning:
⚠️ This action is irreversible.

We strongly recommend exporting your data first.

To permanently delete all your data, send:

DELETE ALL DATA
settings.deleted: Your data has been permanently deleted.

stay.removed:
🗑 停留已删除。

现在可以输入正确的日期。

manage.ask_exit: Enter new exit date (or "Present" to clear):
